notes: Fail-closed semantic bridge obligation tracker. Each entry maps a SolidityBridge.lean hypothesis to its upstream verity discharge dependency. macroMigrated=true means the operation has a full (non-stub) implementation in the canonical macro contract, currently Morpho/Contract.lean. Links 2+3 (EDSL → IR → Yul compilation correctness) are delegated to Verity's compiler framework — the verity_contract macro generates code exclusively from supported patterns, so SupportedStmtList/SupportedSpec witnesses should be constructive.
